text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Create dashboard chart components","description":"Create pure SVG chart components for the dashboard redesign:
1. src/dashboard/src/components/DashboardCard.svelte - Paper texture card with torn-edge SVG filter, grain overlay, props: title, subtitle, accent
2. src/dashboard/src/components/BarChart.svelte - Pure SVG bar chart, props: data [{label,value,color}], height, showLabels. Animated bars, hover tooltips.
3. src/dashboard/src/components/AreaChart.svelte - Pure SVG area/line chart for time series, props: data [{date,value}], height, color, filled. Gradient fill.
4. src/dashboard/src/components/DonutChart.svelte - Pure SVG donut for provider distribution, props: segments [{label,value,color}], size. Center text.
5. src/dashboard/src/components/SavingsComparison.svelte - Side-by-side "You paid" vs "OpenAI would cost", animated counter, uses BarChart internally.

Design: "Dark Paper" theme - dark warm gray (#1a1816) bg, dark paper cards (#252220), torn-edge SVG filter, grain. Accent: green #27864a, stamp orange #d4831a, marker purple. Fonts: Permanent Marker (headings), Special Elite (labels), Source Sans 3 (body).","assignedBy":"dashboard-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:40:17.959Z"}
Task #2 is already completed — I am dashboard-dev. All 5 components were created in the previous session and task #2 is marked completed in the task list. No further action needed.
summary: Task #2 already done, no action needed
